notes: Closed entries include a reason in issue. Actionable-open entries name schema work that remains after supported mechanics were encoded.

glibness::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Closed: Charisma check floor and truth-magic override are now structured/runtime utility options.

glibness::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: detector matched duration wording only; the spell has no special early ending beyond normal duration.

holy-aura::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: caster choice of affected creatures is now represented by Chosen creatures utility option and defensive effects.
holy-aura::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Added controlOption plus defensive/attack modifier effects.

holy-aura::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: save advantage, incoming attack disadvantage, and Fiend/Undead Constitution save are now represented as runtime effects.
holy-aura::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Defense, Attack Roll Modifier, Save Modifier, and condition rows.
holy-aura::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Added DEFENSIVE, ATTACK_ROLL_MODIFIER, and Blinded STATUS_CONDITION effects.

holy-aura::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: aura/emanation geometry is already represented; no separate light or sound mechanic exists.

holy-aura::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: Blinded is now an explicit structured condition and runtime STATUS_CONDITION effect.

illusory-dragon::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: breath damage type choice, movement timing, and illusion study option are now utility options and runtime prompt/control options.
illusory-dragon::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Added utility options and damage-type choice text.

illusory-dragon::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: Wisdom fear save, Intelligence breath save, and advantage against breath after discernment are now represented.
illusory-dragon::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Save Modifier and condition rows.
illusory-dragon::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Added Frightened STATUS_CONDITION, breath DAMAGE effect, and saveModifier.

illusory-dragon::target_filter_or_eligib.issue: Closed: target is now point/unoccupied space rather than not_applicable.
illusory-dragon::target_filter_or_eligib.recommendedTemplateChange: Changed Targeting Type to point and Valid Targets to unoccupied space.
illusory-dragon::target_filter_or_eligib.recommendedJsonChange: Changed runtime targeting.type to point and validTargets to point.

illusory-dragon::repeat_save_or_recurrin.issue: Closed: frightened repeat save when no line of sight is now represented by repeatSave metadata and option text.

illusory-dragon::sustain_or_recast_actio.issue: Closed: bonus-action movement and breath timing are now represented by grantedActions, movement effect, and utility options.
illusory-dragon::sustain_or_recast_actio.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Bonus-action movement option and Forced Movement row.

illusory-dragon::forced_movement.issue: Closed: detector matched the illusion movement; it is now represented as caster-controlled bonus-action movement, not unwilling forced movement of a creature.
illusory-dragon::forced_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Added MOVEMENT effect for illusion movement.

illusory-dragon::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: sight, seeing-through, and discernment are now represented by line-of-sight targeting, utility options, and save advantage after discernment.
illusory-dragon::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Study to discern and save modifier rows.

illusory-dragon::illusion_or_disguise.issue: Closed: dragon illusion occupancy, tangible defenses, and study-to-discern mechanics are now utility/control options.
illusory-dragon::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Dragon illusion, Tangible illusion defenses, and Study to discern options.

illusory-dragon::sensor_or_remote_percep.issue: Closed: detector matched see/line-of-sight language; no remote sensor is created.

illusory-dragon::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: Frightened is now explicit structured condition and runtime STATUS_CONDITION effect.

illusory-dragon::environmental_change.issue: Closed: Shadowfell/shadow material is creation/illusion description, not a persistent environmental world-state change.

incendiary-cloud::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: caster-chosen movement direction is now represented in Start-turn cloud movement utility option and MOVEMENT effect.

incendiary-cloud::attack_or_save_modifie.issue: Closed: initial, entry, end-turn, and movement-into-space Dexterity saves are now separate runtime damage triggers.
incendiary-cloud::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Triggered Applications and Damage Trigger rows.
incendiary-cloud::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedJsonChange: Added immediate, on_enter_area, and on_end_turn_in_area DAMAGE effects.

incendiary-cloud::healing_or_restoration.issue: Closed: detector false positive from "until"; no healing or restoration mechanic exists.

incendiary-cloud::environmental_change.issue: Closed: heavily obscured smoke, strong-wind dispersal, once-per-turn damage, and cloud movement are now utility options.
incendiary-cloud::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Added cloud utility options plus terrain/movement rows.

maddening-darkness::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: point choice is ordinary area targeting already represented by ranged area geometry.
maddening-darkness::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice template field needed.

maddening-darkness::attack_or_save_modif.issue: Closed: start-turn Wisdom save is now represented by a turn_start damage effect.
maddening-darkness::attack_or_save_modif.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Triggered Applications and Damage Trigger rows.

maddening-darkness::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: darkness, darkvision blocking, light suppression, around-corners spread, and audible madness are now utility options.

maddening-darkness::sensor_or_remote_per.issue: Closed: detector matched darkvision/see-through wording; no remote sensor is created.

maddening-darkness::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: detector matched "until the spell ends"; there is no special early-ending mechanic beyond duration/concentration.

glibness.issue: Actionable open: Glibness needs explicit ability-check floor/minimum-result and truth-detection override fields; current runtime preserves both as utility options only.
glibness.recommendedTemplateChange: Add abilityCheckOverride fields for ability, minimum roll/result, and optional use choice; add truthDetectionOverride field.
glibness.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime socialCheckOverride/truthDetectionOverride objects with not_applicable sentinels for other spells.
glibness.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
glibness.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
glibness.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

holy-aura.issue: Actionable open: Holy Aura needs aura beneficiary selection and attacker-filtered retaliation triggers that are more precise than current effect filters.
holy-aura.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura beneficiary selection and attacker creature-type trigger fields.
holy-aura.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime auraEffect/retaliationTrigger objects with chosen-beneficiary and attacker-type filters.
holy-aura.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
holy-aura.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
holy-aura.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

illusory-dragon.issue: Actionable open: Illusory Dragon needs a richer tangible-illusion entity schema for automatic attack misses, automatic save success, immunity to all damage/conditions, study checks, and discerned-state effects.
illusory-dragon.recommendedTemplateChange: Add tangible illusion entity fields for immunity, auto-miss, auto-save, study DC/action, and discerned-state consequences.
illusory-dragon.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
illusory-dragon.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
illusory-dragon.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

incendiary-cloud.issue: Actionable open: Incendiary Cloud needs a moving area hazard schema that can encode cloud movement, once-per-turn damage gating, and strong-wind dispersal as data rather than only options.
incendiary-cloud.recommendedTemplateChange: Add moving-area hazard fields for start-turn movement, direction choice, once-per-turn gating, and dispersal condition.
incendiary-cloud.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
incendiary-cloud.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
incendiary-cloud.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

maddening-darkness.issue: Actionable open: Maddening Darkness needs darkness/light-suppression fields for around-corners spread, darkvision blocking, spell-level light limits, and audible contents.
maddening-darkness.recommendedTemplateChange: Add darkness/light suppression fields with spell-level threshold and sound payload.
maddening-darkness.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
maddening-darkness.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
maddening-darkness.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
